overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game showing a character walking along a mountain dirt road. The character passes dead bodies and stops at an overlook to view a distant settlement, with snow-capped mountains and overcast skies creating a somber atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain hillside gravel path with power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain path with a rifle strapped to his back, overlooking the valley

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the background
wooden utility poles with wires stretching across the hillside
rocky dirt trail winding along the mountainside
steep rock face rising on the right side of the path
evergreen trees scattered on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel mountain path with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance. Power lines run parallel to the trail as the camera follows from behind, capturing the expansive overcast sky and sparse vegetation.

events.description: encountering multiple dead bodies lying on the gravel road

agents.ego_description: walking past the corpses scattered along the roadside

notable_agents.action: lying dead on the ground near the road sign
lying dead on the ground beside the path

entered.detail: diamond-shaped yellow warning sign on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the path where several dead bodies lie on the gravel. A yellow road sign becomes visible on the right as the character passes the corpses, with rocky cliffs now on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic mountain overlook with valley settlement

events.description: character stops walking to look at the settlement in the valley below
character turns around and resumes walking away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: stopping at the overlook to view the distant town in the valley, then turning and continuing along the path

entered.detail: distant town or camp visible in the valley below with multiple structures
expansive view of the mountain range and valley
large boulder near the edge of the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a scenic overlook and stops to gaze at a settlement nestled in the valley below, framed by snow-capped mountains. After a moment, the character turns and walks back past the yellow road sign, which shifts from right to left in the frame.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road away from the overlook, heading deeper into the rural landscape

entered.detail: mature deciduous tree with thick trunk beside the road
sloping terrain covered in dry grass and low shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the winding dirt road through the rural mountain landscape. The valley settlement disappears from view as the path leads through terrain dotted with pine trees and utility poles, with rocky hillsides rising on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain road that leads to a scenic valley overlook before retreating back into the wilderness. It begins by following a character from behind along a gravel path flanked by power lines, with snow-capped peaks looming under an expansive overcast sky. As the character progresses, the terrain shifts to include rocky cliffs on the left and several dead bodies strewn across the gravel, passing a yellow road sign on the right. The scene then opens up as the character reaches a scenic overlook to gaze at a distant settlement nestled in the valley, before turning around and walking back past the road sign. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wind back through the rural landscape, where the settlement disappears from view and the path is enclosed by pine trees and rising rocky hillsides.
